Introduction to mdJSONdictio

Source: vignettes/01_Intro_mdJSONdictio.Rmd
01_Intro_mdJSONdictio.Rmd


The R package mdJSONdictio aims to streamline the process of creating mdEditor data dictionaries. Rather than defining data table attributes in mdEditor, users can fill out a tabular data dictionary template and translate it to mdJSON using the function build.mdJSON(). The resultant mdJSON file can be imported in mdEditor to create a Dictionary record with data table attributes already defined. Conversely, the functon build.table() translates mdEditor data dictionary files into a tabular format to be used as a human-readable reference.

Function overview

build.mdJSON()

Translates a data frame of the tabular data dictionary into an list object that can be subsequently converted to mdJSON and imported to mdEditor as a Dictionary record. The input data frame must be formatted to a template as described in the Tabular Data Dictionary Template article. A required parameter is title, which accepts a string to designate the title of the Dictionary record in mdEditor.

Tabular data dictionary imported as a data frame in R 
#> # A tibble: 457 × 14
#>     codeName           domainItem_name  domainItem_value definition                                                                                                                                   dataType          allowNull units           unitsResolution isCaseSensitive fieldWidth missingValue minValue maxValue notes
#>     <chr>              <chr>            <chr>            <chr>                                                                                                                                        <chr>             <chr>     <chr>           <lgl>           <chr>           <lgl>      <lgl>           <dbl>    <dbl> <lgl>
#>   1 SpeciesCode        dataElement      dataElement      4-letter American Ornithological Union (AOU) species code of the captured bird                                                               character varying no        NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   2 SpeciesCode        BADE             BADE             Band Destoyed                                                                                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   3 SpeciesCode        BALO             BALO             Band Lost                                                                                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   4 BandNumberIn       dataElement      dataElement      The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when captured                                                              integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   5 BandNumberOut      dataElement      dataElement      The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when released                                                              integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   6 Year               dataElement      dataElement      4-number year of capture; YYYY                                                                                                               year              yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>   7 Month              dataElement      dataElement      1-2-number month of capture; M or MM                                                                                                         integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                  1       12 NA   
#>   8 Day                dataElement      dataElement      1-2-number day of capture; D or DD                                                                                                           integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                  1       31 NA   
#>   9 Country            dataElement      dataElement      Country of capture location                                                                                                                  character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  10 StateProvince      dataElement      dataElement      State or province code of capture location                                                                                                   character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  11 StateProvince      AK               AK               Alaska, USA                                                                                                                                  NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  12 StateProvince      WA               WA               Washington, USA                                                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  13 StateProvince      NWT              NWT              Northwest Territories, Canada                                                                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  14 StateProvince      MAN              MAN              Manitoba, Canada                                                                                                                             NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  15 StateProvince      QUE              QUE              Quebec, Canada                                                                                                                               NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  16 City               dataElement      dataElement      City or town of capture location                                                                                                             character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  17 City               Anchorage        Anchorage        Anchorage, Alaska                                                                                                                            NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  18 City               Yellowknife      Yellowknife      Yellowknife, Northwest Territories, Canada                                                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  19 City               Churchill        Churchill        Churchill, Manitoba, Canada                                                                                                                  NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#>  22 City               Tok              Tok              Tok, Alaska                                                                                                                                  NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#>  36 PlotID             dataElement      dataElement      Plot ID of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations .csv'                                         character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  37 Latitude_dec       dataElement      dataElement      Latitude of capture location in decimal degrees                                                                                              numeric           yes       decimal degrees NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  38 Longitude_dec      dataElement      dataElement      Longitude of capture location in decimal degrees                                                                                             numeric           yes       decimal degrees NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  39 BanderID           dataElement      dataElement      Code of the bander, or bird handler for recaptures; often first initial, middle initial, and last name                                       character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#>  40 ScribeID           dataElement      dataElement      Code of the scribe; often first initial, middle initial, and last name                                                                       character varying yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#> 310 Mass_g             dataElement      dataElement      Mass of captured brid in grams                                                                                                               numeric           yes       grams           NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 311 FatScore           dataElement      dataElement      Fat score of captured bird (0-7)                                                                                                             integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 312 FatScore           0                0                No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body                                                                                               NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 313 FatScore           1                1                Trace; A very small amount of fat in the furcular hollow (< 5% filled)                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 314 FatScore           2                2                Light; The bottom of the furculum is completely covered but the furcular hollow is less than 1/3 filled                                      NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 315 FatScore           3                3                Half; The furcular hollow is about half full, and fat is present under the wingpit and/or on the abdomen                                     NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 316 FatScore           4                4                Filled; The furcular hollow is full and a thick layer of fat also occurs under the wing and on the abdomen                                   NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 317 FatScore           5                5                Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen                                       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 318 FatScore           6                6                Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen                                NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 319 FatScore           7                7                Very excessive;  fat pads of the furculum, 'wingpit,' and abdomen are bulging so that they join                                              NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 320 TotalHead_mm       dataElement      dataElement      Length of the head of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to back of head                                            numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 321 NaresTip_mm        dataElement      dataElement      Length from nares to tip of the captured bird in millimeters                                                                                 numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 322 CulmenLength_mm    dataElement      dataElement      Culmen length of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to base of bill                                                 numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 323 CulmenDepth_mm     dataElement      dataElement      Culmen depth of the of the captured brid in millimeters; measured at the distal end of the nares                                             numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 324 CulmenWidth_mm     dataElement      dataElement      Culmen width of the captured bird in millimeters; measured at the distal end of the nares                                                    numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 325 Tarsus_mm          dataElement      dataElement      Length of the tarsometatarsus on the captured bird in millimeters                                                                            numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 326 Wing_mm            dataElement      dataElement      Length of the folded wing of the captured bird in millimeters.                                                                               numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 327 Tail_mm            dataElement      dataElement      Length of central rectrices on the captured bird in millimeters                                                                              numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#> 330 P10_mm             dataElement      dataElement      Length of the primary 10 feather on the captured bird in millimeters; measured from skin to tip of feather                                   numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 331 P10Exposed_mm      dataElement      dataElement      Length of the exposed primary 10 feather (out of sheathing) on the captured bird in millimeters                                              numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 332 P1Length_mm        dataElement      dataElement      Length of primary 1 feather of the captured bird in millimeters                                                                              numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 333 P1LessCov_mm       dataElement      dataElement      Length from primary 1 feather to lesser cover feather of the captured bird in millimeters                                                    numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 334 R1Length_mm        dataElement      dataElement      Length of rectrix 1 feather of the captured bird in millimeters                                                                              numeric           yes       millimeters     NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 335 CloacalProtub      dataElement      dataElement      Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird                                                                                                  integer           yes       NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 336 CloacalProtub      0                0                Cloaca not enlarged                                                                                                                          NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 337 CloacalProtub      1                1                Small; Cloaca somewhat enlarged and noticeably swollen and the shape is conical                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 338 CloacalProtub      2                2                Medium; Cloacal protuberance large and the shape is cylindrical                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 339 CloacalProtub      3                3                Large; Cloacal protuberance very large and bulbous                                                                                           NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 340 BroodPatch         dataElement      dataElement      Brood patch score of captured bird                                                                                                           character         yes       NA              NA              yes             NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 341 BroodPatch         0                0                Absent                                                                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 342 BroodPatch         1                1                Not completely defeathered                                                                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 343 BroodPatch         2                2                Well defined, breast muscles and gut still visible through the skin                                                                          NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 344 BroodPatch         3                3                Veined and red; the skin is opaque, thickened or engorged, veined and reed with broad, undulating wrinkles                                   NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA   
#> 345 BroodPatch         4                4                Wrinkled, the skin has thin wrinkles, engorgement of the skin has gone                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

#> 363 BodyMolt           0                0                No body molt                                                                                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

NA                NA        NA              NA              NA              NA         NA                 NA       NA NA

BBL Disposition code describing the disposition of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"cc7d3663-f579-4d3e-acc9-0f02937caf20\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"3--\",\"value\":\"3--\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Banding or trapping mortality\"},{\"name\":\"5--\",\"value\":\"5--\",\"definition\":\"Sick, Exhausted, Over-stressed, Injured, or with a Physical Deformity\"},{\"name\":\"300\",\"value\":\"300\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Federal numbered metal band only.\"},{\"name\":\"301\",\"value\":\"301\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Colored leg band(s): plastic, metal, paint, tape.\"},{\"name\":\"310\",\"value\":\"310\",\"definition\":\"All flight feathers on one or both wings clipped or pulled plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"315\",\"value\":\"315\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Mouth swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.\"},{\"name\":\"317\",\"value\":\"317\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Tracheal swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.\"},{\"name\":\"318\",\"value\":\"318\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken\"},{\"name\":\"319\",\"value\":\"319\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"325\",\"value\":\"325\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Two or more types of auxiliary markers.\"},{\"name\":\"333\",\"value\":\"333\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"334\",\"value\":\"334\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"380\",\"value\":\"380\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Satellite/ Cell/ GPS transmitter\"},{\"name\":\"381\",\"value\":\"381\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Radio transmitter.\"},{\"name\":\"389\",\"value\":\"389\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, transmitter (use 380/381 when applicable)\"},{\"name\":\"390\",\"value\":\"390\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Datalogger (i.e. geolocator)\"},{\"name\":\"3--\",\"value\":\"3--\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Banding or trapping mortality\"}],\"codeName\":\"BBLStatus\",\"description\":\"The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was released\"},{\"domainId\":\"3cbf986b-38bd-4345-9a60-6c7194c5eca0\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Unknown condition of the bird; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Dead; Unknown if band was removed\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Dead; Band left on bird\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Dead; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Alive - Released; Unknown if band was removed\"},{\"name\":\"7\",\"value\":\"7\",\"definition\":\"Alive - Released; Band left on bird\"},{\"name\":\"8\",\"value\":\"8\",\"definition\":\"Alive \\u2013 Released; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"9\",\"value\":\"9\",\"definition\":\"Alive - In captivity; Unknown if band was removed\"},{\"name\":\"10\",\"value\":\"10\",\"definition\":\"Alive - In captivity; Band left on bird\"},{\"name\":\"11\",\"value\":\"11\",\"definition\":\"Alive - In captivity; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Unknown condition of the bird; Band removed\"}],\"codeName\":\"BBLCondition\",\"description\":\"The BBL Condition code describing the condition of the captured bird and the federal metal band\"},{\"domainId\":\"fb54008b-3f51-4692-97b4-cf4d0cf65928\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"X\",\"value\":\"X\",\"definition\":\"Metal (Aluminum) federal length\"},{\"name\":\"BO\",\"value\":\"BO\",\"definition\":\"Behavioral observation\"}],\"codeName\":\"HowSexed\",\"description\":\"The BBL HowSexed code describing how the captured bird was sexed; multiple methods seperated by ','\"},{\"domainId\":\"3fd3c1d1-0166-4d1e-99d8-2d306e640042\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; A very small amount of fat in the furcular hollow (< 5% filled)\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; The bottom of the furculum is completely covered but the furcular hollow is less than 1/3 filled\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Half; The furcular hollow is about half full, and fat is present under the wingpit and/or on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Filled; The furcular hollow is full and a thick layer of fat also occurs under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"7\",\"value\":\"7\",\"definition\":\"Very excessive;  fat pads of the furculum, 'wingpit,' and abdomen are bulging so that they join\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body\"}],\"codeName\":\"FatScore\",\"description\":\"Fat score of captured bird (0-7)\"},{\"domainId\":\"5a0719fb-9e0b-4ed1-8383-f470a7b88f9d\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca not enlarged\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Small; Cloaca somewhat enlarged and noticeably swollen and the shape is conical\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Medium; Cloacal protuberance large and the shape is cylindrical\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Large; Cloacal protuberance very large and bulbous\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca not enlarged\"}],\"codeName\":\"CloacalProtub\",\"description\":\"Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"ef5575f9-d988-4c45-ba31-494f4637d706\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Absent\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Not completely defeathered\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Well defined, breast muscles and gut still visible through the skin\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Veined and red; the skin is opaque, thickened or engorged, veined and reed with broad, undulating wrinkles\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Wrinkled, the skin has thin wrinkles, engorgement of the skin has gone\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Feathering over\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Present\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Absent\"}],\"codeName\":\"BroodPatch\",\"description\":\"Brood patch score of Feathers\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt limit\"}],\"codeName\":\"MoltLimit\",\"description\":\"Code indicating the region where molt limits (two generations of feathers) are present on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"5c404013-4eb6-41de-8ec6-75cd78dd9122\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No body molt\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; Only a very few feathers molting anywhere on the bird\\u2019s body in no discernible pattern.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; Fewer than one-third of the contour feathers on the bird are molting\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Medium; From one to two-thirds of a bird\\u2019s contour feathers are in molt.\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy; More than two-thirds of the contour feathers on the bird are in molt.\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No body molt\"}],\"codeName\":\"BodyMolt\",\"description\":\"Body molt score of the captured plumage remains, although the bird already has begun its preformative molt.\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Full juvenal body #> 
#> $data[[1]]$attributes$`date-updated`
#> [1] "2022-04-20T01:41:00.000Z"
#> 
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$type
#> [1] "dictionaries"


build.table()

Translates a list object converted from an mdEditor mdJSON data dictionary file into a data frame to be used as a human-readable reference. The output is formatted to the template described in the [Tabular Data Dictionary Template] section. Optional parameters are entity_num and dictionary_num, which accept integers to indicate the dictionary and entity to be processed if more than one exists in the mdJSON file. This is useful when multiple entities are created in the Entity tab of a Dictionary record or multiple dictionaries are exported together in mdEditor. By default, entity_num = 1 and dictionary_num = 1, so if the mdJSON file only has one entity and dictionary, these parameters can be ignored.

Note: Depending on how the Dictionary record was completed in mdEditor, an mdJSON file processed by this function may output a table with additional columns other than those in the tabular data dictionary template. Refer to the mdJSON Data Dictionary to translate these and other mdEditor terms.

mdJSON data dictionary imported as a list in R 
#> $data
#> $data[[1]]
#> $data[[1]]$id
#> [1] "5bc77d4e"
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$attributes
#> $data[[1]]$attributes$profile
#> [1] "org.adiwg.profile.full"
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$attributes$json

length\"},{\"name\":\"BO\",\"value\":\"BO\",\"definition\":\"Behavioral observation\"}],\"codeName\":\"HowSexed\",\"description\":\"The BBL HowSexed code describing how the captured bird was sexed; multiple methods seperated by ','\"},{\"domainId\":\"3fd3c1d1-0166-4d1e-99d8-2d306e640042\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; A very small amount of fat in the furcular hollow (< 5% filled)\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; The bottom of the furculum is completely covered but the furcular hollow is less than 1/3 filled\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Half; The furcular hollow is about half full, and fat is present under the wingpit and/or on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Filled; The furcular hollow is full and a thick layer of fat also occurs under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"7\",\"value\":\"7\",\"definition\":\"Very excessive;  fat pads of the furculum, 'wingpit,' and abdomen are bulging so that they join\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body\"}],\"codeName\":\"FatScore\",\"description\":\"Fat score of captured bird (0-7)\"},{\"domainId\":\"5a0719fb-9e0b-4ed1-8383-f470a7b88f9d\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca not enlarged\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Small; Cloaca somewhat enlarged and noticeably swollen and the shape is conical\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Medium; Cloacal protuberance large and the shape is cylindrical\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Large; Cloacal protuberance very large and bulbous\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca not enlarged\"}],\"codeName\":\"CloacalProtub\",\"description\":\"Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"ef5575f9-d988-4c45-ba31-494f4637d706\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Absent\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Not completely defeathered\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Well defined, breast muscles and gut still visible through the skin\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Veined and red; the skin is opaque, thickened or engorged, veined and reed with broad, undulating wrinkles\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Wrinkled, the skin has thin wrinkles, engorgement of the skin has gone\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Feathering over\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Present\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Absent\"}],\"codeName\":\"BroodPatch\",\"description\":\"Brood patch score of captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"f3dcd2b9-0b9d-45a9-ace5-dd87ff8b510d\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt limit\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Primaries\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Secondaries\"},{\"name\":\"R\",\"value\":\"R\",\"definition\":\"Rectrices\"},{\"name\":\"C\",\"value\":\"C\",\"definition\":\"Primary upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"U\",\"value\":\"U\",\"definition\":\"Underwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"G\",\"value\":\"G\",\"definition\":\"Greater upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"V\",\"value\":\"V\",\"definition\":\"Primary coverts vs greater coverts\"},{\"name\":\"L\",\"value\":\"L\",\"definition\":\"Lesser upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"M\",\"value\":\"M\",\"definition\":\"Median upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"B\",\"value\":\"B\",\"definition\":\"Body Feathers\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt limit\"}],\"codeName\":\"MoltLimit\",\"description\":\"Code indicating the region where molt limits (two generations of feathers) are present on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"5c404013-4eb6-41de-8ec6-75cd78dd9122\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No body molt\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; Only a very few feathers molting anywhere on the bird’s body in no discernible pattern.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; Fewer than one-third of the contour feathers on the bird are molting\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Medium; From one to two-thirds of a bird’s contour feathers are in molt.\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy; More than two-thirds of the contour feathers on the bird are in molt.\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No body molt\"}],\"codeName\":\"BodyMolt\",\"description\":\"Body molt score of the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"ec8992a4-2f52-4cac-8fb9-cba4a3d6bae4\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No juvenal body plumage.\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Less than half of the juvenal body plumage remains.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"More than half of the juvenal body plumage remains, although the bird already has begun its preformative molt.\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Full juvenal body plumage.\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No juvenal body plumage.\"}],\"codeName\":\"JuvPlumage\",\"description\":\"The presence of juvenal body plumage on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"8c94929d-44f7-4121-b5b4-b8790a13dac1\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"N\",\"value\":\"N\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Symmetric\"},{\"name\":\"A\",\"value\":\"A\",\"definition\":\"Adventicious\"},{\"name\":\"J\",\"value\":\"J\",\"definition\":\"Juvininle Growth\"},{\"name\":\"N\",\"value\":\"N\",\"definition\":\"None\"}],\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherMolt\",\"description\":\"Code describing the type of molt occuring in the flight feathers of the bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"ccc71b8f-0cc6-40b9-bfd6-337c0dac14cc\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Slight\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Moderate\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Excessive\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"None\"}],\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherWear\",\"description\":\"The pointed\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Somewhat rounded\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Rounded\"},{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Pointed\"}],\"codeName\":\"RectShape\",\"description\":\"Degree of rectrix feather roundness on the captured bird (0-3)\"},{\"domainId\":\"384f5de2-4078-42c9-8056-67a093aafb38\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"PC\",\"value\":\"PC\",\"definition\":\"Primary Covert; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"GC\",\"value\":\"GC\",\"definition\":\"Greater Covert; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Primary Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Secondary Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"T\",\"value\":\"T\",\"definition\":\"Tertial Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"R\",\"value\":\"R\",\"definition\":\"Retrix; tail flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"down\",\"value\":\"down\",\"definition\":\"down feather\"},{\"name\":\"contour\",\"value\":\"contour\",\"definition\":\"contour feather\"},{\"name\":\"semiplume\",\"value\":\"semiplume\",\"definition\":\"semiplume feather\"},{\"name\":\"filoplume\",\"value\":\"filoplume\",\"definition\":\"filoplume feather\"},{\"name\":\"body\",\"value\":\"body\",\"definition\":\"unspecified body feather (down, contour, semiplume, or filoplume)\"},{\"name\":\"bristle\",\"value\":\"bristle\",\"definition\":\"bristle feather\"},{\"name\":\"PC\",\"value\":\"PC\",\"definition\":\"Primary Covert; wing flight feather\"}],\"codeName\":\"FeatherType\",\"description\":\"Code identifying type of feather collected from the captured bird; specific feather number provided, if known\"},{\"domainId\":\"d676cdbc-58df-469c-8156-f24441bce8d3\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"},{\"name\":\"GPS\",\"value\":\"GPS\",\"definition\":\"GPS tag\"},{\"name\":\"Radio\",\"value\":\"Radio\",\"definition\":\"Radio tag\"},{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"}],\"codeName\":\"TagType1\",\"description\":\"Type of device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"1297f9eb-fd16-4fe8-8afd-4c4fcfa4d848\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"},{\"name\":\"GPS\",\"value\":\"GPS\",\"definition\":\"GPS transmitter\"},{\"name\":\"Radio\",\"value\":\"Radio\",\"definition\":\"Radio transmitter\"},{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"}],\"codeName\":\"TagType2\",\"description\":\"Type of second device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"56bb76d7-a919-4617-b1f3-c6f09e9d6ea6\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Deployed\",\"value\":\"Deployed\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured without tag, bird released with new tag\"},{\"name\":\"Removed\",\"value\":\"Removed\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured with tag, bird released without tag\"},{\"name\":\"Replaced\",\"value\":\"Replaced\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured with tag, bird released with new tag\"},{\"name\":\"Retained\",\"value\":\"Retained\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured with tag, bird released with same tag\"},{\"name\":\"Lost\",\"value\":\"Lost\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured without tag when tag was expected (previously deployed and not yet removed)\"},{\"name\":\"Deployed\",\"value\":\"Deployed\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured without tag, bird released with new tag\"}],\"codeName\":\"TagStatus1\",\"description\":\"Status of the device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"b5309607-309e-4c71-b000-c498a2d6df55\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Deployed\",\"value\":\"Deployed\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured without tag, bird released with new tag\"},{\"name\":\"Removed\",\"value\":\"Removed\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured with tag, bird released without tag\"},{\"name\":\"Replaced\",\"value\":\"Replaced\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured with tag, bird released with new tag\"},{\"name\":\"Retained\",\"value\":\"Retained\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured with tag, bird released with same tag\"},{\"name\":\"Lost\",\"value\":\"Lost\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured without tag when tag was expected (previously deployed and not yet removed)\"},{\"name\":\"Deployed\",\"value\":\"Deployed\",\"definition\":\"Bird recaptured without tag, bird released with new tag\"}],\"codeName\":\"TagStatus2\",\"description\":\"Status of the second device attached to the captured bird\"}],\"entity\":[{\"entityId\":\"832dc42b-fa4b-4538-baec-10301ae248c7\",\"attribute\":[{\"allowNull\":false,\"codeName\":\"SpeciesCode\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"4-letter American Ornithological Union (AOU) species code of the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"22a7ecb5-6988-40a9-96b0-6d1aec3e123b\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BandNumberIn\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when captured\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BandNumberOut\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when released\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Year\",\"dataType\":\"year\",\"definition\":\"4-number year of capture; YYYY\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Month\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"1-2-number month of capture; M or MM\",\"minValue\":\"1\",\"maxValue\":\"12\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Day\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"1-2-number day of capture; D or DD\",\"minValue\":\"1\",\"maxValue\":\"31\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Country\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Country of capture location\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"StateProvince\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"State or province code of capture location\",\"domainId\":\"a357b4eb-bb63-454f-b077-8b4369da35e2\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"City\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"City or town of capture location\",\"domainId\":\"4e209505-d7e9-4900-9df6-837ec333315e\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Area\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Area of capture location; more specific than state or province, though not a city or town\",\"domainId\":\"2ae92e38-93fe-4ce4-ac89-3cf46f6bcddc\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"PlotName\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Plot name of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations.csv'\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"PlotID\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Plot ID of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations .csv'\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Latitude_dec\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Latitude of capture location in decimal degrees\",\"units\":\"decimal degrees\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Longitude_dec\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Longitude of capture location in decimal degrees\",\"units\":\"decimal degrees\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BanderID\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Code of the bander, or bird handler for recaptures; often first initial, middle initial, and last name\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"ScribeID\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Code of the scribe; often first initial, middle initial, and last name\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CaptureTime\",\"dataType\":\"time\",\"definition\":\"Time of bird capture; 24:00\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"ReleaseTime\",\"dataType\":\"time\",\"definition\":\"Time of bird release; 24:00\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BBLDisposition\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Disposition code describing the disposition of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"53281daf-bba9-4557-b8a9-dfd7ac1b4115\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BBLStatus\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was released\",\"domainId\":\"cc7d3663-f579-4d3e-acc9-0f02937caf20\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BBLCondition\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Condition code describing the condition of the captured bird and the federal metal band\",\"domainId\":\"3cbf986b-38bd-4345-9a60-6c7194c5eca0\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"ULIn\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Upper left leg; combination of bands, flags, and data loggers attached when captured; seperated by '-'\",\"domainId\":\"fb54008b-3f51-4692-97b4-cf4d0cf65928\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FlagCodeIn\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Alpha-numeric code on plastic, field-readable flag placed on the bird's leg when captured\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FlagCodeOut\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Alpha-numeric code on plastic, field-readable flag placed on the bird's leg when released\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"NestID\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Unique nest identifier associated with captured bird; based on person who found nest or nest location\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BandSize\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Size code describing the size of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CaptureMethod\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Method used to capture the bird\",\"domainId\":\"67f29a98-1faa-45b7-8827-e5f2c51fc38b\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Age\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Age description of the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"f19281f6-cdb2-4568-b8d2-7b42acc1eb59\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Sex\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"definition\":\"Code describing the sex of the captured bird as determined in the field\",\"domainId\":\"388eb14a-2ec2-487a-908d-097dd6460f84\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"HowAged\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"The BBL HowAged code describing how the captured bird was aged; multiple methods seperated by ','\",\"domainId\":\"889f50f0-0ac6-43bb-a2bc-1abfa9c9788b\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"HowSexed\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"The BBL HowSexed code describing how the captured bird was sexed; multiple methods seperated by ','\",\"domainId\":\"5e31d12a-0e8d-4d24-a840-3ca25bff9d49\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Mass_g\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Mass of captured brid in grams\",\"units\":\"grams\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FatScore\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"Fat score of captured bird (0-7)\",\"domainId\":\"3fd3c1d1-0166-4d1e-99d8-2d306e640042\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TotalHead_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of the head of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to back of head\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"NaresTip_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length from nares to tip of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CulmenLength_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Culmen length of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to base of bill\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CulmenDepth_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Culmen depth of the of the captured brid in millimeters; measured at the distal end of the nares\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CulmenWidth_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Culmen width of the captured bird in millimeters; measured at the distal end of the nares\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Tarsus_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of the tarsometatarsus on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Wing_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of the folded wing of the captured bird in millimeters.\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Tail_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of central rectrices on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Gape_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Gape length of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"LongestPrimary_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of longest primary of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"P10_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of the primary 10 feather on the captured bird in millimeters; measured from skin to tip of feather\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"P10Exposed_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of the exposed primary 10 feather (out of sheathing) on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"P1Length_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of primary 1 feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"P1LessCov_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length from primary 1 feather to lesser cover feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"R1Length_mm\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Length of rectrix 1 feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"CloacalProtub\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"5a0719fb-9e0b-4ed1-8383-f470a7b88f9d\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BroodPatch\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"definition\":\"Brood patch score of captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"ef5575f9-d988-4c45-ba31-494f4637d706\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BodyCover_dec\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Estimated cover of body feathers on the captured bird; percent formatted as a decimal\",\"minValue\":\"0\",\"maxValue\":\"1\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FeatherContrast\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether there is color contrast on the underwing coverts of the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"MoltLimit\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"definition\":\"Code indicating the region where molt limits (two generations of feathers) are present on the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"f3dcd2b9-0b9d-45a9-ace5-dd87ff8b510d\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BodyMolt\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"Body molt score of the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"5c404013-4eb6-41de-8ec6-75cd78dd9122\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"JuvPlumage\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"The presence of juvenal body plumage on captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"ec8992a4-2f52-4cac-8fb9-cba4a3d6bae4\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherMolt\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"definition\":\"Code describing the type of molt occuring in the flight feathers of the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"8c94929d-44f7-4121-b5b4-b8790a13dac1\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherWear\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"The degree of feather wear on the captured bird (0-5)\",\"domainId\":\"ccc71b8f-0cc6-40b9-bfd6-337c0dac14cc\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"RectMolt\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"The presence and characteristics of active rectrix feather molt on the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"f41ac838-4329-4ba7-a47c-f75746023875\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"RectWear\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"The degree of rectrix feather wear on the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"979ecf6d-961d-466e-b6bd-476587211421\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"RectShape\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"definition\":\"Degree of rectrix feather roundness on the captured bird (0-3)\",\"domainId\":\"e6dae04c-dfd4-4732-9a49-a9fdb7293a76\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Buccal\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether a buccal swab sample was collected from captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Fecal\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether a fecal sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Nails\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether a nail sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Blood\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether a blood sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodFilter\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether a blood filter sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodSmear\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether a blood smear was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodGenetics\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for genetic testing (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodIsotope\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for isotope analysis (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"BloodHg\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for mercury (Hg) contamination testing (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Feather\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether a feather sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Downy\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether downy feathers were collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FeatherIsotope\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether a feather sample was collected from the captured bird for isotope analysis (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"FeatherType\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Code identifying type of feather collected from the captured bird; specific feather number provided, if known\",\"domainId\":\"384f5de2-4078-42c9-8056-67a093aafb38\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagType1\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Type of device attached to the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"d676cdbc-58df-469c-8156-f24441bce8d3\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagType2\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Type of second device attached to the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"1297f9eb-fd16-4fe8-8afd-4c4fcfa4d848\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagStatus1\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Status of the device attached to the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"56bb76d7-a919-4617-b1f3-c6f09e9d6ea6\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagStatus2\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Status of the second device attached to the captured bird\",\"domainId\":\"b5309607-309e-4c71-b000-c498a2d6df55\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagID1\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Identification number of the device attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagID2\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Identification number of the second device attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"PlatformID1\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Platform identification number of the device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"PlatformID2\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Platform identification number of the second device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagMass1_g\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Mass of the device attached to the captured bird in grams\",\"units\":\"grams\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagMass2_g\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"Mass of the second device attached to the captured bird in grams\",\"units\":\"grams\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagAttachment1\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Description of how the device is attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"TagAttachment2\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Description of how the second device is attached to the captured bird\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"RadioFrequency_mHz\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"definition\":\"The original radio frequency of the radio tag attached to the captured bird  in millihertz.\",\"units\":\"megahertz\"},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Photos\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"definition\":\"Whether photos of the captured bird were collected (Y/N)\",\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"allowNull\":true,\"codeName\":\"Notes\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"definition\":\"Additional notes\"}],\"definition\":\"Generalized data dictionary for banding data. Some attributed and domain items may not be represented in the associated dataset.\",\"codeName\":\"Banding\"}],\"responsibleParty\":{\"party\":[{\"contactId\":\"4ca610b7-5a62-4a23-94c3-f4bb5821ae4e\"}],\"role\":\"author\"},\"description\":\"Generalized data dictionary for banding data. Some attributed and domain items may not be represented in the associated dataset.\",\"dictionaryIncludedWithResource\":true}}"

#> 255 Wing_mm            dataElement     dataElement      Length of the folded wing of the captured bird in millimeters.                                                "numeric"           "yes"     "millimeters"     NA              ""              NA         NA                 NA       NA ""                                    
#> 256 Year               dataElement     dataElement      4-number year of capture; YYYY                                                                                "year"              "yes"     ""                NA              ""              NA         NA                 NA       NA ""                                    
#> 257 Zone               dataElement     dataElement      State Plane Coordinate System zone of capture location                                                        "integer"           "yes"     ""                NA              ""              NA         NA                 NA       NA ""


Intented use

mdJSONdictio functions are intended for anyone who writes mdEditor metadata. build.mdJSON() helps ease the process of creating mdEditor Dictionary records by allowing users to complete some fields in a simplified tabular format. build.table() creates a human-readable data dictionary reference for an mdEditor Dictionary record. A potential workflow is to use build.mdJSON() to initiate a Dictionary record, the mdEditor web application to maintain the Dictionary record, and build.table() to create an up-to-date human-readable data dictionary as needed.
